title: Linearized Boundary Control Method for Damping Reconstruction in an Acoustic Inverse Boundary Value Problem
summary: We develop a linearized boundary control method for the inverse boundary value problem of determining the damping coefficient in the damped wave equation. The objective is to reconstruct an unknown perturbation in a known background damping from the linearized Neumann-to-Dirichlet map. When the linearization is at a constant background damping, we derive a reconstructive algorithm with stability estimates based on the boundary control method in dimension $n\geq 1$. The reconstruction algorithm is implemented in one dimension to validate its numerical feasibility. When the linearization is at a non-constant background damping, we establish an increasing stability estimate in the time domain in dimension $n\geq 3$.

AI.tldr: 提出线性化边界控制方法，用于从Neumann-to-Dirichlet映射的线性化中重建阻尼波方程中的阻尼系数扰动
AI.motivation: 研究阻尼波方程的反边值问题，目标是从已知背景阻尼中重建未知扰动，这在医学成像、无损检测等领域有重要应用
AI.techniques: 线性化边界控制方法、Neumann-to-Dirichlet映射的线性化分析、稳定性估计、数值实现算法
AI.main_theorems: 1) 常数背景阻尼下的重建算法与稳定性估计(n≥1维)；2) 非常数背景阻尼下时域中的递增稳定性估计(n≥3维)
AI.significance: 为阻尼波方程反问题提供了新的重建方法，建立了理论稳定性，并在数值上验证了可行性，对反问题理论和应用有重要贡献

title: The Batchelor spectrum for a deterministically driven passive scalar
summary: We study the long-time behavior of a passive scalar transported by an incompressible flow in the presence of smooth, deterministic forcing. For a specific spatially Lipschitz and time-periodic velocity field, we prove that all sufficiently smooth initial data is attracted to a limiting solution that satisfies a cumulative form of Batchelor's law. To our knowledge, this provides the first example for which a version of Batchelor's law can be established with deterministic forcing.

AI.tldr: 证明了在特定时空周期速度场下，所有光滑初值都会被吸引到满足累积形式Batchelor定律的极限解
AI.motivation: 研究不可压缩流动中被动标量的长时间行为，特别关注确定性强迫下Batchelor定律的成立条件，填补了确定性强迫下该定律证明的空白
AI.techniques: 针对特定空间Lipschitz且时间周期速度场，分析被动标量输运方程，建立初值到极限解的吸引性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了所有充分光滑的初值都会被吸引到一个满足累积形式Batchelor定律的极限解，这是确定性强迫下该定律的首个严格证明
AI.significance: 首次在确定性强迫下建立了Batchelor定律的数学基础，为湍流被动标量统计理论提供了严格分析框架

title: Gradient estimates for nonlinear elliptic equations with Orlicz growth and measure data
summary: We establish gradient estimates of solutions to a class of nonlinear elliptic equations with measure data under Orlicz-type growth conditions. The growth is governed by the structural condition \[ 0<i_a\le t g'(t)/g(t)\le s_a<1. \] We obtain two types of regularity results: pointwise Wolff potential estimates for the gradient of solutions in the singular regime $i_a \in \big(\frac{n-1}{2n-1},1\big)$, and Lipschitz regularity of the solutions in the regime $i_a \in (0,1)$. In the power-type case $g(t)=t^{p-1}$, our results recover the known gradient estimates for the singular $p$-Laplace equation.

AI.tldr: 建立了Orlicz型增长条件下带测度数据的非线性椭圆方程解的梯度估计
AI.motivation: 研究具有Orlicz型增长条件和测度数据的非线性椭圆方程，这类方程在奇异p-Laplace方程和更一般的非线性椭圆理论中具有重要意义，需要建立解的梯度正则性估计
AI.techniques: 使用Wolff势估计方法，在奇异区域利用点估计技术，在一般区域建立Lipschitz正则性，处理Orlicz型增长条件和测度数据的相互作用
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在奇异区域$i_a \in \big(\frac{n-1}{2n-1},1\big)$中，获得解的梯度的点态Wolff势估计；2. 在区域$i_a \in (0,1)$中，证明解的Lipschitz正则性；3. 在幂型情形$g(t)=t^{p-1}$下，结果恢复奇异p-Laplace方程的已知梯度估计
AI.significance: 将奇异p-Laplace方程的梯度估计推广到更一般的Orlicz型增长条件，为处理更广泛的非线性椭圆方程提供了理论工具，在偏微分方程正则性理论中具有重要意义

title: Stability Estimates for the Inverse Problem of Reconstructing Point sources in Parabolic Equations
summary: In this work, we investigate the stability issue of the inverse problem of determining the locations and time-dependent amplitudes of point sources in a parabolic equation with a non-self adjoint elliptic operator from boundary observations. We derive different stability estimates for determining the locations and the amplitudes of the sources in the space, the plane as well as in dimension one. The analysis employs a novel approach that combines several different arguments, including the improved regularity of the solutions, the application of Carleman estimates, time extension of solutions, and construction of explicit solutions to the adjoint equations. Further we provide numerical reconstructions to complement the theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了非自伴椭圆算子抛物方程中点源位置和时变振幅的逆问题稳定性，获得了不同维度的稳定性估计。
AI.motivation: 研究抛物方程中点源定位和振幅确定的逆问题稳定性，特别是针对非自伴椭圆算子的情况，从边界观测数据中恢复源的位置和时变振幅。
AI.techniques: 结合改进解的正则性、Carleman估计、解的时间延拓、以及构造伴随方程的显式解等多种方法的新颖分析框架。
AI.main_theorems: 推导了确定点源位置和振幅在不同维度（空间、平面、一维）的稳定性估计，为逆问题提供了理论保证。
AI.significance: 为非自伴算子抛物方程逆问题提供了系统的稳定性理论，结合数值重构验证了理论结果，对反问题理论和应用有重要意义。

title: Existence and singularity formation for the supersonic expanding wave of radially symmetric non-isentropic compressible Euler equations
summary: This paper studies the existence and singularity formation of supersonic expanding waves for the radially symmetric non-isentropic compressible Euler equations of polytropic gases. We introduce a suitable pair of gradient variables to characterize the rarefaction and compression properties of the solutions. Based on their Riccati equations, we construct several useful invariant domains to establish a series of priori estimates of solutions under some assumptions on the initial data. We show that the solution is smooth in the characteristic triangle or quadrangle domain if both of these two gradient variables are non-negative at the initial time. On the other hand, when one of these two variables is very negative at some initial point, the solution forms a singularity in finite time.

AI.tldr: 研究了多方气体径向对称非等熵可压缩Euler方程的超音速膨胀波的存在性和奇点形成
AI.motivation: 研究多方气体径向对称非等熵可压缩Euler方程中超音速膨胀波的存在性和奇点形成问题，这是流体力学中重要的数学问题
AI.techniques: 引入梯度变量对来刻画解的稀疏和压缩性质，基于Riccati方程构造不变域，建立先验估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当两个梯度变量初始非负时解在特征三角形或四边形域中光滑；当其中一个变量初始负值时解在有限时间内形成奇点
AI.significance: 为可压缩流体动力学中波的形成和奇点分析提供了新的数学框架，对理解激波形成机制有重要意义

title: Uniform-in-diffusivity mixing by shear flows: stochastic and dynamical perspectives
summary: We study passive scalar mixing by parallel shear flows in the presence of weak molecular diffusion. We recover the sharp uniform-in-diffusivity mixing rate for shear flows with finitely many critical points, recently proven in [1]. Our approach is based on the stochastic representation formula of the associated advection-diffusion equation and yields two short proofs. The first uses a stochastic integration-by-parts argument and gives optimal mixing under the weakest regularity assumption required in the zero-diffusion case, answering Question II in [1, Section 4]. The second adopts a dynamical systems perspective and provides a proof of shear-induced mixing that, to our knowledge, is new even in the zero-diffusivity setting.

AI.tldr: 通过随机表示公式给出剪切流混合的两个简短证明，回答了文献中的公开问题
AI.motivation: 研究弱分子扩散下平行剪切流的被动标量混合问题，特别是针对有限个临界点的剪切流，旨在恢复最近证明的与扩散系数无关的尖锐混合速率
AI.techniques: 基于平流-扩散方程的随机表示公式，使用随机积分分部积分法和动力系统视角两种方法
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在零扩散情况所需的最弱正则性假设下获得最优混合，回答了文献[1]中的Question II；2) 提供了即使在零扩散情况下也新颖的剪切诱导混合证明
AI.significance: 为剪切流混合理论提供了简洁优雅的新证明方法，解决了文献中的公开问题，并引入了动力系统视角的新见解

title: Identification of a Point Source in the Heat Equation from Sparse Boundary Measurements
summary: In this work we investigate the inverse problem of recovering one point source in the heat equation from sparse boundary measurement, i.e., the flux data at several points on the boundary. We prove the unique recovery of the location and piecewise constant in time amplitude when the domain is the unit ball in $\mathbb{R}^d$ ($d\geq2$), and the unique recovery of the location and compactly supported amplitude when the domain is simply connected, smooth and bounded in $\mathbb{R}^2$, under mild conditions on the observational points. The proof combines distinct analytical tools, including the representation of the flux data via Laplacian eigenfunctions on the unit ball, a detailed analysis of the properties of the heat and Poisson kernels, as well as methods drawn from complex analysis. Further we present several numerical experiments to illustrate the feasibility of the recovery from sparse boundary data.

AI.tldr: 证明了从稀疏边界测量中唯一恢复热方程点源位置和振幅的逆问题
AI.motivation: 研究热方程中从稀疏边界测量（边界上几个点的通量数据）恢复点源（位置和振幅）的逆问题，这在环境监测、医学成像等应用中有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 结合了单位球上拉普拉斯特征函数表示通量数据、热核和泊松核的详细性质分析、以及复分析方法等多种解析工具。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当区域是ℝ^d（d≥2）中的单位球时，唯一恢复点源位置和分段常数时间振幅；2. 当区域是ℝ^2中单连通光滑有界区域时，唯一恢复点源位置和紧支振幅。
AI.significance: 为热方程逆问题提供了稀疏边界测量下的理论保证，扩展了点源识别问题的理论框架，具有实际应用价值。

title: $L^2$-contraction of Shock Waves for KdV-Burgers Equation
summary: The KdV-Burgers equation is a canonical model describing the interplay between nonlinearity, viscosity and dispersion, and it admits viscous-dispersive shocks as traveling wave solutions. In this paper, we establish an $L^2$-contraction property for viscous-dispersive shocks under arbitrarily large perturbations, up to a time-dependent shift. This yields time-asymptotic stability and uniform estimates with respect to the strengths of viscosity and dispersion. We present the proof for the monotone shocks, and introduce the companion work in [6] on the stability and structural properties of oscillatory shocks.

AI.tldr: 建立了KdV-Burgers方程单调激波在任意大扰动下的L^2收缩性质，得到时间渐近稳定性及关于粘性和色散强度的均匀估计
AI.motivation: KdV-Burgers方程是描述非线性、粘性和色散相互作用的典型模型，其允许粘性-色散激波作为行波解。研究这些激波解的稳定性对于理解物理系统中非线性波动的长期行为至关重要。
AI.techniques: 使用L^2收缩方法，引入时间依赖的平移变换，处理任意大扰动情况，建立与粘性和色散强度无关的均匀估计
AI.main_theorems: 建立了单调激波在任意大扰动下的L^2收缩性质，得到时间渐近稳定性，证明结果对粘性和色散强度具有均匀性
AI.significance: 这是首次在任意大扰动下建立KdV-Burgers方程激波解的稳定性，为理解粘性-色散系统的长期动力学行为提供了理论基础，结果具有物理应用价值

title: Rigidity of balls in the solid mean value property for polyharmonic functions
summary: We show that balls are the only open bounded domains for which the mean value formula for polyharmonic functions holds. We do so by adapting an argument of Ü. Kuran for harmonic functions. Also, we provide a quantitative version of the same result.

AI.tldr: 证明了球是唯一满足多调和函数均值公式的有界开区域
AI.motivation: 研究多调和函数的均值性质，探索哪些区域满足均值公式，这是调和函数理论在多调和情形下的推广
AI.techniques: 采用了Ü. Kuran用于调和函数的论证方法，并进行了适应性修改以处理多调和函数情形
AI.main_theorems: 1. 主要定理：球是唯一满足多调和函数均值公式的有界开区域；2. 定量版本：提供了该结果的定量形式
AI.significance: 将调和函数的经典均值性质推广到多调和函数，建立了区域几何形状与多调和函数均值性质之间的深刻联系

title: Backward problem for a degenerate viscous Hamilton-Jacobi equation: stability and numerical identification
summary: This work is devoted to the analysis of the backward problem for a viscous Hamilton-Jacobi equation with degenerate diffusion and a general Hamiltonian that is not necessarily quadratic. First, we focus on linear degenerate parabolic equations in the nondivergence setting. We prove the conditional stability of the backward problem using Carleman estimates. Then, by a linearization technique, we prove similar results for the nonlinear viscous Hamilton-Jacobi equation. Regarding numerical identification, we first investigate the linear degenerate equation with noisy data using the adjoint state method, combined with a Conjugate Gradient algorithm, to solve the associated minimization problem. Finally, the numerical identification for the nonlinear viscous Hamilton-Jacobi equation is investigated by the Van Cittert iteration. Numerical tests are presented to show the performance of the proposed algorithms.

AI.tldr: 研究退化扩散粘性Hamilton-Jacobi方程反问题的条件稳定性和数值识别方法
AI.motivation: 研究具有退化扩散和一般非二次Hamiltonian的粘性Hamilton-Jacobi方程的反问题，这类方程在最优控制、金融数学和物理中有广泛应用，但反问题研究较少
AI.techniques: Carleman估计证明条件稳定性，线性化技术处理非线性方程，伴随状态法结合共轭梯度算法求解最小化问题，Van Cittert迭代处理非线性数值识别
AI.main_theorems: 证明了线性退化抛物方程反问题的条件稳定性，通过线性化技术将结果推广到非线性粘性Hamilton-Jacobi方程，提出了数值识别算法
AI.significance: 为退化扩散粘性Hamilton-Jacobi方程反问题提供了理论分析和数值方法，扩展了Carleman估计在非线性方程反问题中的应用，具有理论和计算价值

title: Quantitative maximal $L^2$-regularity for viscous Hamilton-Jacobi PDEs in 2D and Mean Field Games
summary: We discuss quantitative Calderón-Zygmund estimates in $W^{2,2}$ for 2D viscous Hamilton-Jacobi equations with natural growth in the gradient. We apply the result to obtain the existence of classical solutions for stationary second order Mean Field Games systems in 2D with (defocusing) coupling behaving like $m^α$ for any $α>0$. We also survey on the known results for the regularity of viscous Hamilton-Jacobi equations and second order Mean Field Games and list several open problems.

AI.tldr: 建立了二维粘性Hamilton-Jacobi方程在自然梯度增长条件下的定量Calderón-Zygmund估计，并应用于具有任意正指数耦合的二维平稳二阶平均场博弈系统经典解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究二维粘性Hamilton-Jacobi方程在自然梯度增长条件下的正则性理论，特别是W^{2,2}空间中的定量Calderón-Zygmund估计，并将这些结果应用于平均场博弈系统，解决具有任意正指数耦合的二维平稳二阶平均场博弈经典解的存在性问题
AI.techniques: Calderón-Zygmund理论、粘性Hamilton-Jacobi方程的正则性分析、自然梯度增长条件下的估计技术、平均场博弈系统的解耦方法、W^{2,2}空间中的定量估计
AI.main_theorems: 1) 二维粘性Hamilton-Jacobi方程在自然梯度增长条件下的定量Calderón-Zygmund估计；2) 具有任意α>0耦合行为如m^α的二维平稳二阶平均场博弈系统经典解的存在性定理
AI.significance: 扩展了粘性Hamilton-Jacobi方程的正则性理论，为平均场博弈系统提供了新的存在性结果，特别是处理了任意正指数耦合的情况，对平均场博弈理论和应用有重要意义，同时提出了该领域的若干开放问题

title: Large-data solutions in multi-dimensional thermoviscoelasticity with temperature-dependent viscosities
summary:
This paper investigates a quasilinear parabolic system arising in thermoviscoelasticity of Kelvin-Voigt type with temperature-dependent viscosity and coupled terms. The system, given by \begin{equation*}
  \begin{cases}
  u_{tt}=\nabla\cdot\big(γ(Θ)\nabla u_t\big)+aΔu-\nabla\cdot f(Θ), & x \in Ω,\ t > 0,
  Θ_t=ΔΘ+γ(Θ)|\nabla u_t|^2-f(Θ)\nabla u_t, & x \in Ω,\ t > 0,
  u=0,\quad\frac{\partialΘ}{\partialν}=0, & x \in \partialΩ,\ t > 0,
  u(x,0)=u_0(x),\; u_t(x,0)=u_{0t}(x),\;Θ(x,0)=Θ_0(x), & x \in Ω,
  \end{cases} \end{equation*} models heat generation by acoustic waves in solid materials and can be derived as a scalar simplification of more complex piezoelectric-thermoviscoelastic model. Under the assumptions that $u_0\in H_0^1(Ω)$, $u_{0t}\in L^2(Ω)$, $Θ_0\in L^1(Ω)$ with $Θ_0\geqslant0$ a.e.~in $Ω$, that $γ,f\in C^0([0,\infty))$ satisfy $f(0)=0$, and that there exist constants $k_γ,K_γ,K_f>0$ and $0<α<\frac{N+2}{2N}$ such that $$k_γ\leqslantγ(ξ)\leqslant K_γ\quad\text{and}\quad |f(ξ)|\leqslant K_f(1+ξ)^α\qquad\forall~ξ\geqslant0,$$ we establish the global existence of weak solutions for arbitrarily large initial data in bounded domains $Ω\subset\mathbb{R}^N$ ($N\geqslant1$). The result extends recent one-dimensional finding \cite{WinklerZAMP} to the multi-dimensional setting without requiring any smallness condition on the data.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有温度依赖粘性的Kelvin-Voigt型热粘弹性拟线性抛物系统在多维情形下的全局弱解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究固体材料中声波产生热量的热粘弹性模型，该模型是复杂压电-热粘弹性模型的标量简化形式，旨在将一维结果推广到多维情形
AI.techniques: 使用弱解理论、能量估计、紧性方法、正则化技术，处理温度依赖的粘性系数和耦合非线性项
AI.main_theorems: 在温度依赖粘性系数有正下界、非线性项满足多项式增长条件下，对任意大的初值建立了多维有界区域中全局弱解的存在性
AI.significance: 将一维结果推广到多维，无需小初值条件，为热粘弹性系统的数学理论提供了重要进展，对材料科学和声热效应研究有应用价值

title: Asymptotic behavior of the solution with positive temperature in nonlinear 3D thermoelasticity
summary: In this paper, we study a hyperbolic-parabolic coupled system arising in nonlinear three-dimensional thermoelasticity. We establish the global well-posedness and asymptotic behavior of solutions. Our main result shows that, a thermoelastic body asymptotically converges to an equilibrium state with a uniform temperature distribution for every initial data, determined by energy conservation. The proof of the global well-posedness is divided into some steps. To begin with, we introduce an approximate problem and derive its solvability. Next, we establish a time-independent upper bound for the temperature via Moser iteration technique. Together with an estimate of gradient of entropy, we use a functional involving the Fisher information of the temperature, which enables us to handle a delicate Gronwall-type inequality, to obtain required estimates of the higher-order derivatives. Further, we prove the strict positivity of temperature by applying Moser iteration again on the negative part of the logarithm of the temperature, followed by a uniqueness argument for the weak solution. Finally, we define a dynamical system on a proper functional phase space and analyze the $ω$-limit set for every initial data. This work provides a complete proof of the global well-posedness and the long-time behavior in the nonlinear three-dimensional thermoelasticity system.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维非线性热弹性耦合系统的全局适定性和渐近行为，证明热弹性体对所有初始数据都渐近收敛到具有均匀温度分布的平衡态
AI.motivation: 研究三维非线性热弹性耦合系统，这是一个双曲-抛物耦合系统，需要解决全局适定性和长时间行为等基本数学问题
AI.techniques: 使用近似问题求解、Moser迭代技术处理温度上界、熵梯度估计、Fisher信息泛函处理Gronwall型不等式、对数温度负部的Moser迭代证明温度严格正性、动力系统理论和ω-极限集分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了三维非线性热弹性系统的全局适定性，证明了对所有初始数据，热弹性体都渐近收敛到具有均匀温度分布的平衡态，该平衡态由能量守恒确定
AI.significance: 为非线性三维热弹性理论提供了完整的数学基础，首次完整证明了该系统的全局适定性和长时间行为，对固体力学和热力学耦合问题的数学分析有重要贡献

title: $Γ$-convergence for nonlocal phase transitions involving the $H^{1/2}$ norm and surfactants
summary:
We study functionals \begin{equation*}
  F_\varepsilon (u,ρ) := \frac{1}{\varepsilon} \int_ΩW(u) \, dx
  + \frac{1}{|\ln(\varepsilon)|} \int_Ω\int_Ω
  \frac{(u(y) - u(x))^2}{|y - x|^{N+1}} \, dy \,dx
  + \frac{1}{|\ln(\varepsilon)|} \int_Ω\left| \int_Ω
  \frac{(u(y) - u(x))^2}{|y - x|^{N+1}} \, dy -
  ρ(x) \right| \,dx \end{equation*} for a double-well potential $W$ and a nonlocal, critically scaled gradient-like term, together with a surfactant term. We show compactness in the space of $BV$ functions on $Ω$ and the $Γ$-convergence to an energy given as local perimeter-type functional, depending also on the limit density of surfactant on the interface, plus the total variation of the surfactant measure away from the interface.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了包含非局部临界尺度梯度项和表面活性剂项的泛函的Γ-收敛性，证明了其收敛到依赖于界面表面活性剂密度的局部周长型泛函。
AI.motivation: 研究具有非局部临界尺度梯度项和表面活性剂项的泛函的渐近行为，这类泛函在相分离现象、界面动力学和材料科学中有重要应用，旨在理解表面活性剂对界面能量和结构的影响。
AI.techniques: 使用Γ-收敛理论、BV函数空间紧性分析、非局部到局部极限的尺度分析、界面能量估计和表面活性剂密度分布的变分方法。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了泛函序列在BV函数空间中的紧性，并建立了Γ-收敛到局部周长型泛函的结果，该极限泛函依赖于界面上的表面活性剂密度分布和界面外的表面活性剂测度的全变差。
AI.significance: 为包含表面活性剂的相分离系统提供了严格的数学框架，将非局部模型与经典的局部界面模型联系起来，对理解表面活性剂在界面形成和稳定中的作用有重要理论意义。

title: Steady States of Transport-Coagulation-Nucleation Models
summary: To model the dynamics of polymers formed through nucleation, elongated by polymerisation, shortened by depolymerisation and subject to aggregation reactions, we study a nonlinear integro-differential equation. Growth and shrinkage are described by transport terms, nucleation by a positive boundary condition, and aggregation by a Smoluchowski coagulation kernel. Our main result is the existence of steady states for the multiplicative coagulation kernel despite this kernel producing gelation in finite time for the pure coagulation equation. This is made possible by a sufficiently strong decay rate for large polymers. Beyond the existence result, the qualitative properties of the steady states are illustrated through explicit examples and numerical experiments. The analytical results connect the growth behaviour of the transport velocity and of the coagulation kernel to the decay properties of steady states.

AI.tldr: 证明了在乘法凝聚核下聚合物动力学非线性积分微分方程稳态解的存在性，尽管该核在纯凝聚方程中会导致有限时间凝胶化
AI.motivation: 研究聚合物动力学，包括成核、聚合、解聚和聚集反应，建立非线性积分微分方程模型来描述这些复杂过程
AI.techniques: 使用非线性积分微分方程、Smoluchowski凝聚核、边界条件处理成核、输运项描述生长和收缩、稳态分析
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果是证明了在乘法凝聚核下稳态解的存在性，尽管该核在纯凝聚方程中会导致有限时间凝胶化，这通过大聚合物足够强的衰减率实现
AI.significance: 为聚合物动力学提供了数学理论框架，揭示了输运速度增长行为和凝聚核与稳态衰减性质的关系，对理解聚合物系统平衡态有重要意义

title: Confinement and orbital stability of solitons of the NLS equation on metric graphs
summary: We study the behavior of soliton states for the subcritical, time-dependent focusing NLS equation on a large family of non-compact metric graphs with Kirchhoff boundary conditions. This family is characterized by a topological assumption (``Assumption H'' in the literature) which rules out the existence of a ground state for all members of the class, with a single exception: the bubble-tower metric graph. We present two main results. First, we show that if the initial datum is close (in the energy norm) to a soliton placed on a single half-line of the graph and sufficiently far from the nearest vertex, then the corresponding solution remains confined to the same half-line for all times, and close to the soliton, up to a remainder that stays small in the energy norm. As a nontrivial application, this yields reflection of a slow soliton upon collision with the compact core of the graph, a phenomenon that first we prove and then we further investigate numerically. Second, for the exceptional case of bubble-tower graphs, we prove that the ground state (which exists only in this case) is orbitally stable. We emphasize that this example does not allow an immediate application of the Cazenave--Lions orbital stability argument, which requires a suitable modification. Finally, we discuss how the ideas and methods developed here may extend beyond the class of metric graphs with Kirchhoff boundary conditions and satisfying Assumption H. In particular, we extend the results to the meaningful case of the line in the presence of a smooth potential or a delta interaction.

AI.tldr: 研究亚临界聚焦NLS方程在非紧度量图上的孤子行为，证明孤子在特定条件下保持稳定和反射现象，并在特殊图结构中发现基态的轨道稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究亚临界聚焦非线性薛定谔方程(NLS)在非紧度量图上的孤子动力学行为，特别关注具有Kirchhoff边界条件的图结构。核心问题是在拓扑假设H下（该假设排除了大多数图的基态存在），孤子如何与图的紧致核心相互作用，以及是否存在稳定的孤子态。
AI.techniques: 使用能量范数估计、轨道稳定性理论、Cazenave-Lions方法的修改版本、数值模拟验证，以及将结果推广到带势场或δ相互作用的线的情况。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 孤子局域化定理：若初始数据接近位于图单半线上的孤子且远离最近顶点，则解始终局限在同一半线且保持接近孤子态；2. 慢孤子反射现象：孤子与图紧致核心碰撞时发生反射；3. 气泡塔图的基态轨道稳定性：在唯一存在基态的特殊图结构中证明轨道稳定性。
AI.significance: 首次在非紧度量图上系统研究NLS孤子的动力学行为，揭示了拓扑结构对孤子稳定性的影响，为图上的非线性波传播理论提供了新见解，方法可推广到带势场或相互作用的系统，具有理论和数值模拟的双重意义。

title: On the simplicity of the sloshing eigenvalues
summary: This paper investigates sloshing problems defined by $-Δu=0$ in $Ω$, with mixed boundary conditions: $\partial_νu=λu$ on $S$, and either $\partial_νu=0$ or $u=0$ on $W$. Here, $Ω$ represents a smooth bounded domain in $\mathbb{R}^n$ with boundary $\partialΩ=S \cup W$. We demonstrate that under small domain perturbations, all resulting eigenvalues are simple.

AI.tldr: 证明了在微小区域扰动下，带混合边界条件的sloshing问题的所有特征值都是简单的
AI.motivation: 研究sloshing问题（描述流体在容器中晃动的数学模型）的特征值问题，该问题由拉普拉斯方程定义，具有混合边界条件：一部分边界是Neumann条件，另一部分是Robin条件。主要关注特征值在区域微小扰动下的性质。
AI.techniques: 使用特征值摄动理论、区域扰动分析方法、混合边界条件下椭圆算子的谱理论，以及特征值简并性分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在区域Ω发生微小扰动时，sloshing问题产生的所有特征值都是简单的（即特征值的几何重数为1）
AI.significance: 为sloshing问题的谱稳定性提供了理论保证，表明在物理上合理的微小扰动下不会出现特征值简并，这对于流体动力学中的稳定性分析和数值计算具有重要意义

title: Fast dynamo action on the 3-torus for pulsed-diffusions
summary: We study a pulsed-diffusion version of the kinematic dynamo equation on the three-dimensional torus, in which vector transport and resistive diffusion act alternately over unit time intervals. We provide a rigorous proof that the fast dynamo conjecture holds for this model. Our approach is genuinely perturbative in the magnetic diffusivity. We construct a time-periodic, divergence-free, and Lipschitz stretch-fold-shear velocity field, which generates a uniformly hyperbolic flow map. To analyze this system, we develop anisotropic Banach spaces specifically adapted to the map's dynamics, allowing us to recover favourable spectral properties for the associated dynamo operator. By characterizing the ideal dynamo operator in the strong-chaos limit, we prove that it admits an eigenvalue with modulus strictly greater than 1. Finally, we demonstrate that this instability persists under the singular perturbation of the heat semigroup for all sufficiently small values of the diffusivity, thereby establishing fast dynamo action.

AI.tldr: 本文为脉冲扩散版运动学发电机方程提供了首个严格证明，证实了在三维环面上快速发电机猜想成立。
AI.motivation: 研究三维环面上脉冲扩散版运动学发电机方程，旨在为快速发电机猜想提供严格数学证明。该猜想认为在磁扩散率趋近于零时，发电机增长率应保持正极限，但此前缺乏严格数学论证。
AI.techniques: 采用微扰方法处理磁扩散率；构造时间周期、无散、Lipschitz的拉伸-折叠-剪切速度场；建立适应动力学映射的各向异性Banach空间；分析理想发电机算子的谱性质；处理热半群的奇异扰动。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造了生成一致双曲流映射的速度场；2. 证明了理想发电机算子存在模大于1的特征值；3. 证明了对于所有足够小的扩散率，该不稳定性在热半群的奇异扰动下持续存在，从而建立了快速发电机作用。
AI.significance: 这是对快速发电机猜想的首个严格数学证明，为天体物理和等离子体物理中的磁场生成理论提供了坚实的数学基础。方法创新包括各向异性Banach空间的构造和奇异扰动分析，对动力系统和偏微分方程理论有重要贡献。

title: Finite-energy solutions to Einstein-scalar field Lichnerowicz equations on complete Riemannian manifolds
summary: We consider the singular elliptic problem of the form \[ -Δu + V(x)u = \mathcal{B}(x)|u|^{2^*-2}u + \frac{\mathcal{A}(x)}{|u|^{2^*}u}, \qquad u\in H^1(M), \] where the coefficients are allowed to have low regularity. Under natural spectral assumptions on $-Δ+V$, geometric assumptions on the manifold $M$ ensuring the Sobolev embedding $H^1(M)\hookrightarrow L^{2^*}(M)$, and a suitable global integrability/smallness condition involving $\mathcal{A}$, $\mathcal{B}$, and a function $ψ\in H^1(M)$, we prove the existence of a nonnegative finite-energy supersolution. If, in addition, the Ricci curvature is nonnegative and $\mathcal{B}\ge 0$, we obtain a positive finite-energy solution. The proof relies on a family of $\varepsilon$-regularized problems, mountain pass arguments, and a limiting procedure in which Harnack's inequality plays a crucial role in handling the singular term on noncompact manifolds. We also prove a nonexistence result showing that the global integrability condition on $\mathcal{A}$ is, in a precise sense, necessary for the existence of nonnegative supersolutions.

AI.tldr: 证明了在低正则性系数和奇异非线性项条件下，非紧流形上奇异椭圆问题非负超解和正解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究非紧流形上具有奇异非线性项的椭圆方程，系数允许低正则性，探索奇异项和低正则性系数对解存在性的影响
AI.techniques: ε-正则化方法、山路引理、极限过程、Harnack不等式（处理非紧流形上的奇异项）、谱分析和几何假设
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在谱假设、几何假设和全局可积性条件下，存在非负有限能量超解；2. 若Ricci曲率非负且B≥0，则存在正有限能量解；3. 全局可积性条件对非负超解存在性是必要的
AI.significance: 扩展了奇异椭圆方程理论到非紧流形和低正则性系数情形，建立了存在性与系数全局可积性的精确关系，为处理奇异非线性项提供了新方法

title: Complex Dynamics of Wave-Character Transitions in Radially Symmetric Isentropic Euler Flows: Theory and Numerics
summary: We investigate the qualitative dynamics of smooth solutions to the radially symmetric isentropic compressible Euler equations, focusing specifically on the evolution of rarefactive and compressive wave characters across three distinct configurations: the outward supersonic, subsonic, and inward supersonic regimes. For each case, we establish structural restrictions on wave-character transitions and identify invariant sign domains for gradient variables under specific initial data conditions. While our findings refine existing invariance properties in the outward supersonic regime, they reveal novel asymmetric transition mechanisms in the subsonic and inward regimes that are absent in purely supersonic expanding cases. Consequently, we derive sufficient conditions for finite-time singularity formation. To complement the analytical results where closed-form solutions are unavailable, we provide numerical experiments using a Semi-Discrete Lagrangian-Eulerian (SDLE) formulation. These simulations reproduce the predicted wave-character dynamics and offer qualitative evidence that supports our theoretical findings, providing a unified description of wave transitions in radially symmetric isentropic gas dynamics.

AI.tldr: 研究了径向对称等熵可压缩欧拉方程中稀疏波和压缩波的定性动力学，建立了波特征转换的结构限制，并推导了有限时间奇点形成的充分条件。
AI.motivation: 研究径向对称等熵可压缩欧拉方程中波特征的演化动力学，特别关注稀疏波和压缩波在三种不同配置（向外超声速、亚声速和向内超声速）中的转换机制，以理解波特征的定性行为。
AI.techniques: 使用波特征分析方法，建立梯度变量的不变符号域，推导波特征转换的结构限制，结合半离散拉格朗日-欧拉(SDLE)数值模拟验证理论结果。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了向外超声速、亚声速和向内超声速三种配置下波特征转换的结构限制；2. 在特定初始条件下识别了梯度变量的不变符号域；3. 推导了有限时间奇点形成的充分条件；4. 揭示了亚声速和向内超声速区域中不存在于纯超声速膨胀情况的新颖非对称转换机制。
AI.significance: 该研究深化了对径向对称气体动力学中波特征演化的理解，特别是揭示了亚声速和向内超声速区域的新转换机制，为理解可压缩流中的奇点形成提供了理论基础，并通过数值实验验证了理论预测，为波转换提供了统一的描述框架。

title: On a fractional nonlinear Schrödinger equation with irregular coefficients. case: d<2s
summary: In the case when $d<2s$, where $d$ is the space dimension and $s$ is the fractional power of the Laplacian, we study the well-posedness for a cubic nonlinear Schrödinger equation (CNLSE) generated by the fractional Laplacian and involving distributional, or less regular, coefficients. We formulate our problem in the setting of the concept of so-called very weak solutions and prove that it has a very weak solution. Moreover, we prove the uniqueness in some adequate sense as well as the compatibility of the very weak solution with the classical one when the latter exists. Our results cover the classical case when: $d=1, s=1$. A second task in this paper is to conduct some numerical experiments where interesting behaviours of the very weak solution are observed. The obtained result is the first example of the very weak well-posedness in the setting of nonlinear partial differential equations.

AI.tldr: 该论文首次在非线性偏微分方程框架下建立了分数阶拉普拉斯立方非线性薛定谔方程在分布系数下的非常弱解适定性理论。
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶拉普拉斯立方非线性薛定谔方程在分布系数或低正则性系数下的适定性问题，特别是当空间维数d小于2s时的情形，填补了非线性PDE中非常弱解适定性理论的空白。
AI.techniques: 采用非常弱解概念，通过正则化技术处理分布系数，结合分数阶拉普拉斯算子的性质，建立解的存在性、唯一性和相容性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了非常弱解的存在性，建立了某种意义下的唯一性，证明了当经典解存在时非常弱解与经典解的相容性，结果覆盖了经典情形d=1,s=1。
AI.significance: 这是非线性偏微分方程中非常弱解适定性理论的第一个实例，为处理低正则性系数问题提供了新框架，并通过数值实验展示了非常弱解的独特行为。
